title: How do I update my Duo enrollment when I get a new phone?
plain_text: Update your Duo enrollment when you get a new phone by signing in to the Northeastern MFA website from a computer, authenticating with Call Me, and then either reactivating Duo Mobile if you kept the same phone number or deleting the old device and adding a new device if your number changed. Contact the IT Service Desk if you cannot complete the update.

sections.heading: If you kept the same phone number
sections.text: Sign in to the Northeastern MFA website from a computer, authenticate with Call Me, and reactivate Duo Mobile for the phone that kept the same number.
steps: From a computer, go to the Northeastern MFA website.
Sign in with your Northeastern username and password.
Select 'Call Me' for authentication. Duo will call your registered phone. The Duo app will not receive a push on the new device until it is activated on your new phone.
Answer the call and follow the instructions to complete authentication.
On the Device Management page, select 'Call Me' again if prompted and complete authentication.
Find your phone number in the list of registered devices.
Select the settings icon next to your phone number, and then select 'Reactivate Duo Mobile'.
Follow the prompts.
If you have already downloaded the Duo app from the App Store or Google Play, select the checkbox at the bottom of the page when prompted.
Launch the app on your mobile device and use the in-app camera to scan the barcode shown on your computer monitor.

sections.heading: If your phone number changed
sections.text: Authenticate into the Northeastern MFA website, delete the old device, and then add your new device.
steps: Go to the Northeastern MFA website.
Sign in with your Northeastern username and password.
Select 'Call Me' for authentication and complete the call verification.
On the Device Management page, repeat authentication if prompted.
Find your phone number in the list of registered devices.
Select the settings icon next to your number, then select 'Delete Device'.
Select '+ Add a new device'.
Follow the enrollment steps to register the new device.

links.text: How do I enroll in Duo multi-factor authentication (MFA)?

sections.heading: If you need help
sections.text: If your new phone cannot receive calls or you are unable to complete the update, contact the IT Service Desk for assistance.
steps: If your new phone is not active or cannot receive calls with your number, contact the IT Service Desk for further assistance.
If you are unable to complete these steps, contact the IT Service Desk for assistance.
